summary: Implemented Group A live backend wiring for new-ui-evaluation: default live read-only aggregation from session findings, MCP presence, Kubernetes read status, git refs, and OpenSpec state; explicit fixture fallback mode; versioned snapshot and event TypeScript contracts; SSE /api/events with cursor-bearing events; contract and read-only safety tests; docs; and completed only the matching OpenSpec task checkboxes. React view/component implementation, deployment manifests, existing UI files, and smoke scripts were left untouched as out of scope.
tasks_completed: Define the live snapshot schema for overview, rounds, round detail, inbox, runtime, diagnostics, and raw source views.
Define the incremental event schema, including event type, stable id, entity id, source name, timestamp, version or cursor, payload, and source error or staleness metadata.
Add a read-only live data layer for Hub, MCP, Kubernetes, git, and OpenSpec sources, with fixture mode retained only as an explicit development or test fallback.
Add a push-based browser update path using SSE, WebSocket, source-native watch bridging, or an equivalent stream-like mechanism.

Add read-only safety tests proving live loading, streaming, reconnect, resume, and fallback polling do not mutate Hub, MCP, Kubernetes, git, OpenSpec, runtime broker, secrets, PVCs, rounds, or model/provider state.
tests_run: cd new-ui-evaluation && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
